doc: Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_trunc: truncate an MPFR value toward zero to an integer at the caller-supplied prec, returning {value, ternary}. No rnd parameter — direction is implicit (toward zero). Behaviour: drops the fractional part regardless of magnitude or sign, so trunc(2.7)=2, trunc(-2.7)=-2, trunc(0.99)=+0, trunc(-0.99)=-0. Class is 'arithmetic'.
divergence_from_c: Same divergence pattern as mpfr_round/ceil/floor. C mutates rop; TS returns {value, ternary}. Behaviour matches mpfr_rint(r, u, MPFR_RNDZ). NaN→NaN; ±Inf→±Inf; ±0→±0 (signed zero preserved); normal→integer part of magnitude with original sign.
refs: mpfr/src/rint.c L325–L328 — mpfr_trunc defers to mpfr_rint(r, u, MPFR_RNDZ).
